2605.10865.title: BenchCAD: A Comprehensive, Industry-Standard Benchmark for Programmatic CAD
2605.10865.paper_summary: Industrial Computer-Aided Design (CAD) code generation requires models to produce executable parametric programs from visual or textual inputs. Beyond recognizing the outer shape of a part, this task involves understanding its 3D structure, inferring engineering parameters, and choosing CAD operations that reflect how the part would be designed and manufactured. Despite the promise of Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for this task, they are rarely evaluated on whether these capabilities jointly hold in realistic industrial CAD settings. We present BenchCAD, a unified benchmark for industrial CAD reasoning. BenchCAD contains 17,900 execution-verified CadQuery programs across 106 industrial part families, including bevel gears, compression springs, twist drills, and other reusable engineering designs. It evaluates models through visual question answering, code question answering, image-to-code generation, and instruction-guided code editing, enabling fine-grained analysis across perception, parametric abstraction, and executable program synthesis. Across 10+ frontier models, BenchCAD shows that current systems often recover coarse outer geometry but fail to produce faithful parametric CAD programs. Common failures include missing fine 3D structure, misinterpreting industrial design parameters, and replacing essential operations such as sweeps, lofts, and twist-extrudes with simpler sketch-and-extrude patterns. Fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improve in-distribution performance, but generalization to unseen part families remains limited. These results position BenchCAD as a benchmark for measuring and improving the industrial readiness of multimodal CAD automation.
2605.10865.paper_summary_zh: 工業電腦輔助設計（CAD）代碼生成需要模型從視覺或文本輸入中產生可執行的參數化程序。這項任務不僅涉及識別零件的外部形狀，還包括理解其三維結構、推斷工程參數，以及選擇反映零件設計和製造方式的CAD操作。儘管多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在這項任務上有潛力，但它們在現實工業CAD環境中是否具備這些能力卻很少受到評估。我們提出了BenchCAD，這是一個統一的工業CAD推理基準。BenchCAD包含了17,900個執行驗證的CadQuery程序，涵蓋106個工業零件系列，包括斜齒輪、壓縮彈簧、扭轉鑽頭和其他可重用的工程設計。它通過視覺問答、代碼問答、圖像到代碼生成和指令引導的代碼編輯來評估模型，使得在感知、參數化抽象和可執行程序合成方面能進行細緻的分析。在10多個前沿模型中，BenchCAD顯示當前系統通常能恢復粗略的外部幾何形狀，但無法生成忠實的參數化CAD程序。常見的失敗包括缺失細緻的三維結構、誤解工業設計參數，以及用更簡單的草圖和擠出模式替代基本操作，如掃掠、放樣和扭轉擠出。微調和強化學習改善了內部分佈的性能，但對未見過的零件系列的泛化仍然有限。這些結果使BenchCAD成為衡量和改善多模態CAD自動化工業就緒性的基準。
2605.10865.author: Haozhe Zhang et.al.
2605.10865.authors: Haozhe Zhang, Kaichen Liu, Miaomiao Chen, Lei Li, Shaojie Yang, Cheng Peng, Hanjie Chen
